questions.question: Which city is the host of 22nd All India Annual TDS (Tax Deducted at Source) Conference?
questions.explanation: The 22nd All India Annual TDS (Tax Deducted at Source) Conference and Principal Chief Commissioners’ Conclave was recently held at Hotel Taj Lakefront in Bhopal. It was organised by the Income Tax Department of Madhya Pradesh and Chhattisgarh with the Principal Director General of Income Tax (Administration & TPS) under CBDT (Central Board of Direct Taxes). A special awareness poster promoting voluntary tax compliance and timely TDS deductions was unveiled.

questions.question: Janjatiya Gaurav Divas is celebrated every year on which day?
questions.explanation: India celebrated Janjatiya Gaurav Divas on 15 November 2025 to honour tribal freedom fighter Birsa Munda, born in 1874. The year 2024–25 is marked as Janjatiya Gaurav Varsh to celebrate 150 years of his birth. The Ministry of Tribal Affairs organised nationwide workshops, events, and cultural programmes. The Government is setting up 11 Tribal Freedom Fighters Museums to honour tribal uprisings against British rule.

questions.question: Which state is the host of South India Natural Farming Summit 2025?
questions.explanation: Recently, it was announced that Prime Minister Narendra Modi will visit Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu, on 19 November. He will address the South India Natural Farming Summit, which will be hosted by the Farmers’ Associations in Tamil Nadu. The summit will also bring together 50 scientists specialising in organic agriculture. It aims to frame policies to expand natural farming across southern states. The summit seeks to build a people-driven movement for economically viable and socially inclusive agriculture. It will feature 300 exhibition stalls, live demonstrations, policy discussions and youth–women engagement. It is supported by national initiatives like Bharatiya Prakritik Krishi Paddhati and Paramparagat Krishi Vikas Yojana.

questions.question: Which state government has approved the Devbhoomi Parivar Yojana for all resident families in November 2025?
questions.explanation: Recently, Uttarakhand approved the Devbhoomi Parivar Yojana for all resident families. The scheme will create a dynamic database covering every rural and urban household in the state. Each family will get a Family Identification Number (Family-ID) linked to all welfare schemes. Citizens and the government can easily check scheme eligibility and benefits received. The model is inspired by Haryana’s Parivar Pehchan Patra scheme. The database will remove duplicate beneficiaries, reduce paperwork, and support paper-less governance. Urban families, who earlier lacked a family register, will now be fully included.

questions.question: Which country has launched Operation Midas, a major anti-corruption investigation?
questions.explanation: Ukraine recently launched Operation Midas, a major anti-corruption investigation targeting Energoatom officials and connected businessmen. It is a 15-month undercover probe led by NABU (National Anti-Corruption Bureau) and SAPO (Specialised Anti-Corruption Prosecutor’s Office). Named after King Midas, symbolising officials illegally turning contracts into gold. The operation exposed a bribery network demanding 10–15% cuts from contractors and nearly $100 million laundered through backdoor companies. It caused political fallout, forced Energy Minister resignations, and triggered audits of all state-owned enterprises.

questions.question: Where was Asia’s largest and India’s first elevated metro depot inaugurated?
questions.explanation: Mumbai Metro 2B Mandale Depot has been inaugurated, making it Asia’s largest and first elevated metro depot. It is located in Mankhurd, connecting DN Nagar to Mandale. The depot is spread over 30.45 hectares and can accommodate 72 eight-coach trains simultaneously. It is a double-decker facility, with 36 trains on each of the two levels. It was built by the Mumbai Metropolitan Region Development Authority (MMRDA). It features advanced technology, eco-friendly amenities, and future-ready facilities. The depot will increase Metro 2B speed and improve daily travel, especially connecting east and west Mumbai.

questions.question: Which state police has become the first in India to achieve a 100% response rate in cyber fraud calls?
questions.explanation: Goa Police has become the first state police in India to achieve 100% response rate in cyber fraud calls. The cyber fraud call centre received over 5,000 calls, registering 581 complaints. Around 1,500 missed calls were also successfully responded to, ensuring full accessibility. The 1930 cloud-based call centre was launched last month and inaugurated by Union Home Minister Amit Shah. Nine police personnel from the cyber police station attend calls 24/7. The system provides complainants’ details (mobile number, name, date, time) to facilitate follow-up. The initiative significantly improves accessibility and efficiency in handling cyber fraud complaints.

questions.question: Which state has launched KEO, a compact, affordable and AI-ready personal computer, in November 2025?
questions.explanation: On November 17, 2025, Karnataka’s Department of Electronics, IT & BT, with KEONICS, launched KEO, a compact, affordable and AI-ready personal computer designed entirely in Karnataka. KEO stands for Knowledge-driven, Economical, Open-source, built on an open-source RISC-V processor with a Linux-based OS. It features an on-device AI core that works without internet and includes BUDDH, an AI agent trained on the Karnataka DSERT syllabus to help students in low-connectivity areas. KEO will be deployed across schools, universities, businesses, homes and government offices, supporting locally adaptable, home-grown computing.

questions.question: What is the rank of India in the Climate Change Performance Index (CCPI) 2026?
questions.explanation: In the latest Climate Change Performance Index (CCPI) 2026, released by Germanwatch, NewClimate Institute and Climate Action Network at UN COP30, India slipped 13 places to 23rd position with a score of 61.31. India fell from a high to a medium performer due to no coal-exit deadline and continued coal block auctions. CCPI notes medium performance in Greenhouse Gas (GHG) emissions, Climate Policy and Energy Use, and low in Renewable Energy. India shows strong intent with 50% non-fossil capacity achieved early, rising renewable auctions and work on green finance taxonomy and a national carbon market.

questions.question: Where was 30th edition of the Confederation of Indian Industry (CII) Partnership Summit 2025 held?
questions.explanation: The 30th edition of the Confederation of Indian Industry (CII) Partnership Summit 2025 was inaugurated in Visakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh by the Vice-President of India, C. P. Radhakrishnan. It is jointly organised by the Department for Promotion of Industry and Internal Trade (DPIIT), Ministry of Commerce and Industry, CII and the Government of Andhra Pradesh. The theme is “Technology, Trust and Trade: Navigating the New Geoeconomic Order.”
